en: Canada Workers' Compensation Coverage by Province/Territory

Workers’ compensation insurance is legally required in Canadian provinces and territories for companies whose employees, contractors, or workers perform duties in that jurisdiction, including remote or temporary work. This questionnaire will help determine the coverage requirements applicable to your company.

Provincial and Territorial Workers’ Compensation governing bodies are linked below for your reference: Alberta- WCB Alberta British Columbia- WorkSafeBC Manitoba- WCB Manitoba New Brunswick- WorkSafeNB Newfoundland & Labrador- WorkplaceNL Northwest Territories- WSCC NT/NU Nova Scotia- WCB Nova Scotia Nunavut- WSCC NT/NU Ontario- Ontario WSIB Prince Edward Island- WCB PEI Quebec- CNESST Saskatchewan- WCB Saskatchewan Yukon- WCB Yukon
